attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
     NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	 CAST(FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS DATE),
	 CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD')  AS END_TV_DT,
	 NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY  AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY,
     CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_VALUE_TRXL_AMT,0)  AS DECIMAL(18,6))
          *COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
	 AS DV_NCB_COMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT,
     CAST(
     CASE WHEN NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NPPT.BASE_PRICE IS NOT NULL THEN 
          CAST((NPPT.BASE_PRICE/(CASE WHEN NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NPPT.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1)END)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
		  WHEN NPPTB.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL AND NPPTB.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT IS NOT NULL THEN Cast(NPPTB.LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT AS DECIMAL(18,6))/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/ 
     ELSE 
          CAST((COALESCE(NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0.000000)/
     			(CASE WHEN NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 
				OR  NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
				THEN 1 
                  ELSE COALESCE(NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END))
     	 *(COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) )AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
     END  
     *CASE WHEN NP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='AMORTIZED ONE TIME' 
     	  THEN CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))
      ELSE 
     	  CAST(CAST(CASE WHEN NSOL.TRX_SS_CD='AR' THEN
     					                             CASE  WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL='MONTHLY BILLING' THEN 1
     												       WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL='ANNUAL BILLING' THEN 12
     													   WHEN SOL.BILLING_MODEL='QUARTERLY BILLING' THEN 3
     													   WHEN COALESCE(SOL.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') IN ('PREPAID TERM','UNKNOWN') THEN 
     													     CASE WHEN NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT IN(-999,0) 
															 OR  NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT' /*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/ 
															 THEN 1 ELSE NSOL. INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END
     												 END
     					WHEN NSOL.TRX_SS_CD='MANUAL' THEN 1 
     				ELSE
     					CASE WHEN BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT=0 THEN CASE WHEN NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT IN
     					(-999,0) 
						OR  NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/ 
						THEN 1 ELSE NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END ELSE 
						CASE WHEN NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT' THEN 1 ELSE /*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/ 
						BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT  END END
     				END AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
        END * CASE WHEN NSOL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('OFFSET','BIB OFFSET') 
		                THEN CAST(NSOL.BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY * (-1) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) 
                   WHEN NSOL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('ATTRIBUTED','BIB') THEN      
			            CAST( COALESCE(NSOL.BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY,0) * (NSOL.ACV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100.00000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )END  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,
     CAST(CAST(COALESCE(NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT,0.000000) * (NSOL.ACV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT/100.00000000)*COALESCE(NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY,0) 
	 AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6))                AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT, 
	 COALESCE(CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID= 'CHARGES' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END ,'=')        AS DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,
     COALESCE(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4)= 'MISC' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END ,'=')    AS DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,
     COALESCE(CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE ='SERVICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'END  ,'=')    AS DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLAG,
	 NSOL.CFS_CREDIT_CHECK_PENDING_FLAG                  AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,
     NSOL.IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLAG                       AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
     COALESCE(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)                     AS DD_NCB_PRODUCT_KEY,
     NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY                              AS DD_NCB_INVOICED_QTY_AMT,
     NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT                              AS DD_NCB_SK_SLS_ORD_LINE_ID_INT,
     NSOL.SS_CODE                                        AS DD_NCB_SS_CD,
     NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT                               AS DD_NCB_BK_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,   
     NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY                                 AS DD_NCB_ORDER_QTY,
     CAST(NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE AS DATE)   AS DD_NCB_PROMISED_CUST_SHIP_DT,
     NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                           AS DD_NCB_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,                
     CAST(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS TIMESTAMP(0))   AS DD_NCB_SO_LINE_SOURCE_CRT_DTM,
	 NSOL.ORDER_STATUS                                   AS DV_NCB_ORDER_STATUS_CD,
     NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE                 AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
     FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT                     AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
	 USER                                                AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                                AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	 USER                                                AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                                AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	 COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))  
													     AS CONVERSION_RT,
     NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME                                 AS ORDER_DTM,
     NSOL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                              AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
     NSOL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT                    AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	 NSOL.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                        AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	 NSOL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                                 AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
     NSOL.POB_TYPE_CD                                    AS POB_TYPE_CD ,
     NSOL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                             AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG ,
	 NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                    AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
	 NSOL.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY                 AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
  FROM
     (
           SELECT
                NSOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
           CASE
               WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=0 THEN  'ENTERED'
               WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=1 THEN  'CFS HOLD'
               WHEN SUM(NSOL.ORDER_STATUS)=2 THEN  'AUTODISCOUNT HOLD'
               ELSE   'BOTH'
           END                                     AS ORDER_STATUS,
           COALESCE
           (
           CASE
                  WHEN SUM(NSOL.CFS_FLAG_STATUS)=1  THEN 'Y'
                  ELSE 'N' END ,'='
           )                                            AS CFS_CREDIT_CHECK_PENDING_FLAG,
           COALESCE
           (
           CASE
                  WHEN SUM(NSOL.IC_FLAG_STATUS)=1  THEN 'Y'
                  ELSE 'N' END ,'='
           )                                           AS IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLAG,
		   Max(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)              AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
           MAX(NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY)                   AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
           MAX(NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY)                    AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
           MAX(NSOL.BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY)             AS BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY,
           MAX(NSOL.SALES_VALUE_TRXL_AMT)              AS SALES_VALUE_TRXL_AMT,
           MAX(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)                       AS PRODUCT_KEY,
           MAX(NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY)                 AS INVOICED_QUANTITY,
           MAX(NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT)                 AS SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
           MAX(NSOL.SS_CODE)                           AS SS_CODE,
           MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)                  AS BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
           MAX(NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE)    AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
           MAX(NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)              AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
           MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME)            AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
           MAX(NSOL.BOOKINGS_PERCENT)                  AS BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
           MAX(NSOL.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE)    AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
           MAX(NSOL.PRICING_DATETIME)                  AS PRICING_DATETIME,
           MAX(NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE)                   AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
           MAX(NSOL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE)       AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
           MAX(NSOL.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE)              AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
           MAX(NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME)            AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO,
           MAX(NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME)                    AS ORDER_DATETIME,
           MAX(NSOL.CANCELLED_FLAG)                    AS CANCELLED_FLAG,
           MAX(NSOL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME)                AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
           MAX(NSOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE)          AS PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
           MAX(NSOL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD1)                AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
           MAX(DV_PRODUCT_KEY)                         AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
           MAX(DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)                AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
           MAX(SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT)            AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
           MAX(NSOL.ATTRIBUTION_PCT)                   AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT,  
           NSOL.POB_TYPE_CD                            AS POB_TYPE_CD,
           NSOL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                     AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,  
		   Max(NSOL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME)                AS BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
		   Max(NSOL.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT)                AS BK_VERSION_NUM_INT, 
           PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY              AS PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,		   
           MAX(NSOL.ACV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT)               AS ACV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
		   MAX(NSOL.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT)             AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
		   MAX(NSOL.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT)         AS INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
		   MAX(NSOL.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT)           AS BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
		   MAX(NSOL.TRX_SS_CD)                         AS TRX_SS_CD,
		   MAX(NSOL.BOOKING_VERSION_INT)               AS BOOKING_VERSION_INT,
		   NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD            AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/ 
   FROM(
                 
           SELECT  
		         NXSO.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY         AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
		         0 AS ORDER_STATUS,
		         0 AS CFS_FLAG_STATUS,
                 0 AS IC_FLAG_STATUS,
				   /* COALESCE((CASE  WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='CMFS-Credit Check Pending' THEN 1
									  WHEN NSOLT.SS_CD IN ('QTC','BV')  THEN
										   CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='IC Special Discount'  THEN 2 ELSE 0 END 
								ELSE
										   CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='Booking Validation Hold' 
												 AND LINEHOLD.ATTRIBUTE1 = 'Discount validation required' THEN 2
										   ELSE 0 END 
								END),0)AS ORDER_STATUS,
					  COALESCE((CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='CMFS-Credit Check Pending' THEN 1
								ELSE 0 END),0) AS CFS_FLAG_STATUS,
					  COALESCE((CASE WHEN NSOLT.SS_CD IN ('QTC','BV')  THEN
									 CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='IC Special Discount' THEN 1
									 ELSE 0 END
								ELSE
									  CASE WHEN LINEHOLD.BK_SALES_ORDER_HOLD_NAME='Booking Validation Hold' 
											AND LINEHOLD.ATTRIBUTE1 = 'Discount validation required' THEN 1
									  ELSE 0 END 
								END ),0)  AS IC_FLAG_STATUS,
					*/
                 NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY                          AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
                 NSOA.SKU_QTY                                 AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
				 NXSO.TRANSACTION_QTY                         AS BUNDLE_ORDER_QUANTITY,
                 NSOA.SALES_VALUE_TRXL_AMT                    AS SALES_VALUE_TRXL_AMT, 
                 NSOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                          AS PRODUCT_KEY,
		         NSOA.SKU_QTY                                 AS INVOICED_QUANTITY,
                 NXSO.SK_TRX_ID_INT                           AS SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
                 NSOLT.SS_CODE                                AS SS_CODE,             
                 CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)                       AS BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
                 NSOLT.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE         AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
                 NXSO.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
                 NXSO.TRX_LINE_CREATION_DTM                   AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
                 NSOA.BOOKINGS_PCT                            AS BOOKINGS_PERCENT,
                 NSOLT.BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE         AS BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
                 NSOLT.PRICING_DATETIME                       AS PRICING_DATETIME,                 
                 NXSO.LIST_PRICE                              AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
				 NXSO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD                     AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
                 NSO.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE                     AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
                 NSO.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                   AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME_SO,
                 NXSO.ORDER_CREATED_DT                        AS ORDER_DATETIME,
                 CASE WHEN NXSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END 
													          AS CANCELLED_FLAG,
                 NSO.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME                       AS BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME,
                 NSO.PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE                 AS PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,  
                 NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                       AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD1, 
                 COALESCE(NXSO.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY  ,
				 NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                   AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
                 NSOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT             AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
                 NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT                         AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
                 NSOA.POB_TYPE_CD                             AS POB_TYPE_CD,
                 NSOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                      AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
				 NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY             AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
                 NXSO.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME                      AS BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
				 NXSO.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT                      AS BK_VERSION_NUM_INT,
				 NXSO.BOOKING_VERSION_INT                     AS BOOKING_VERSION_INT,
				 NSOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY          AS PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,
				 NSOA.ACV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT                     AS ACV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
				 NSOA.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT                   AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
				 NXSO.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT               AS INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
				 NXSO.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT                 AS BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
				 NXSO.TRX_SS_CD                               AS TRX_SS_CD,
				 NXSO.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD             AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/ 
                 FROM 
                 (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV  
                  WHERE END_TV_DTM=Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <>'CLOUD-CBM') NXSO
				  
  				   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLT
				   ON  NXSO.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
				   
				   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
				   ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
				   AND NSO.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'  
				   AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00' 

                   INNER  JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_XAAS NSOA 
                   ON  NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NSOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY    
                   WHERE NSOLT.SS_CODE IN ('OPL')
				   /*
				   LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SALES_ORDER_LN_HOLD_ACTIVE LINEHOLD
                   ON(NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=LINEHOLD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) */
           ) NSOL
           GROUP BY NSOL.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,NSOL.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, NSOL.POB_TYPE_CD, NSOL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
     )NSOL
     
     CROSS JOIN
     (
     SELECT
     NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
     NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,
     BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
     BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
     FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM,
     $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
     WHERE
     NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
     AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
     ) FMNI
	 
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON (NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY )
	 
	 LEFT JOIN (
     SELECT COALESCE(SOL.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') BILLING_MODEL,TRX_ID,TRX_VERSION  FROM 
     $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_BOOKING_TRANSACTIONS XBT
     LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL SOL ON SOL.LINE_ID=CAST(XBT.LINE_ID AS BIGINT)) SOL
     ON (SOL.TRX_ID=NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND SOL.TRX_VERSION=NSOL.BOOKING_VERSION_INT)
     
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
     ON (NSOL.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE=NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
     AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
     AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME
     AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE='Corporate')
     
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUBSCRIPTION_PRDT_PRC_TV NPPT
     ON  NPPT.PRODUCT_KEY =NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY  
     AND NPPT.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = NSOL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME
     AND NPPT.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT=NSOL.BK_VERSION_NUM_INT 
     AND NPPT.PLAN_TYPE_NM=COALESCE(SOL.PLAN_NAME,'UNKNOWN') 
     AND NPPT.PRICING_FORMULA_CD<>'Rate Table' 
	 /*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPTB ON (NPPTB.ITEM_KEY = NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY) AND NPPTB.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List' AND NSOL.ORDER_DATETIME BETWEEN NPPTB.START_TV_DATE AND NPPTB. END_TV_DATE AND 
     NSOL.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'
	/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/	
     INNER JOIN
     (
         SELECT
			NSOLT.ORDER_CREATED_DT                       AS BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
            NSOLT.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY               AS PRODUCT_KEY,
            NSOLT.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY          AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
            NSOLT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY            AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
            NSC.STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT                     AS STANDARD_COST_AMOUNT
         FROM (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV WHERE XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <>'CLOUD-CBM'
               AND END_TV_DTM=Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))NSOLT
	     INNER JOIN
              (SELECT PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_TV  
               WHERE PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY>0 AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
			   AND TSL_TRX_TYPE_CD='ORDER' GROUP BY 1)DERV_OFFER3
         ON NSOLT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=DERV_OFFER3.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY 
	     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_STANDARD_COST NSC
         ON( NSC.BK_MRP_ORG_NAME = 'GLOBAL ORGANIZATION'
         AND NSC.ITEM_KEY = NSOLT.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
         AND NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME <= NSOLT.ORDER_CREATED_DT)
         QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY NSOLT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,NSOLT.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY
                                     ORDER BY NSC.STANDARD_COST_REVS_DATETIME DESC )=1
    ) NSC
    ON(NSOL.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY=NSC.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY)

SELECT
 NCB2.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY
,NCB2.START_TV_DT
,NCB2.END_TV_DT 
,NCB2.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,NCB2.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,NCB2.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT         
,NCB2.PROCESS_DT                    
,NCB2.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,NCB2.SALESREP_NUMBER               
,NCB2.END_CUSTOMER_KEY              
,NCB2.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NCB2.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NCB2.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NCB2.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_FINAL AS PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY 
,NCB2.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT       
,NCB2.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_USD_AMT      
,NCB2.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT  
,NCB2.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY 
,NCB2.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT  
,NCB2.DD_NCB_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD         
,NCB2.DD_NCB_SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_LINT    
,NCB2.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG       
,NCB2.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG         
,NCB2.REVENUE_FLAG  
,NCB2.RMA_FLAG 
,NCB2.DD_NCB_SS_CD 
,NCB2.CANCELLED_FLAG                
,NCB2.ACQUISITION_FLAG 
,NCB2.DD_OVERLAY_FLAG AS DD_NC_DRVD_OVERLAY_FLG
,NCB2.IC_REVENUE_FLAG               
,NCB2.CHARGES_FLAG
,NCB2.MISC_FLAG 
,NCB2.SERVICE_FLAG  
,NCB2.CORP_BOOKINGS_FLG AS DV_NCB_CORPORATE_NCB_FLG   
,NCB2.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG                     
,NCB2.DD_NCB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT   
,NCB2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
,NCB2.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG
,CASE WHEN NCB2.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor' , 'DVAD')  THEN 'Y'
      WHEN NCB2.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_FINAL = -999 THEN 'N'
      WHEN NCB2.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE='WW Distribution' THEN 'N' 
      WHEN COALESCE(NCPCT.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') ='DVAR' THEN 'Y'
      WHEN COALESCE(NCPCT.PARTNER_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') ='SP' 
              THEN
         CASE WHEN COALESCE(ECSN.RULE_CD,'UNKNOWN')='PARTNER_TYPE_SP_CHECK' THEN 'N'
       WHEN COALESCE(ECSN.RULE_CD,'UNKNOWN')='CHK_GU_PARTY'  
            THEN
                CASE WHEN RCPH_SOLD_TO.GU_PARTY_KEY = RCPH_END_CUST.GU_PARTY_KEY THEN 'N'
                     ELSE 'Y' 
                END
           ELSE 'Y' 
         END
    ELSE 'N'  
    END     
 
                                              AS SALES_CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG 
,NCB2.EDW_CREATE_USER
,NCB2.EDW_CREATE_DTM 
,NCB2.EDW_UPDATE_USER                               
,NCB2.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,NCB2.CONVERSION_RT                         
,NCB2.CONVERSION_DT                 
,NCB2.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  
,NCB2.DV_PRODUCT_KEY  
,NCB2.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY           
,NCB2.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT  
,NCB2.POB_TYPE_CD                   
,NCB2.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                                         
,NCB2.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
,'XAAS' AS TRX_TYPE_CD         
,NCB2.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,-999 ERP_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY    
,-999 XAAS_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY   
,'N'  TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG         
,'N'  HISTORY_FLG 
,CAST(0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_ORIG_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT 
				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB2.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB2.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB2.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 FROM
(
SELECT
 NCB1.SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY                         AS SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY
,NCB1.START_TV_DT                                   AS START_TV_DT
,NCB1.END_TV_DT                                     AS END_TV_DT
,NCB1.CONVERSION_RT                                 AS CONVERSION_RT
,NCB1.SALES_ORDER_KEY                               AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
,NCB1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                          AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NCB1.CONVERSION_DT                                 AS CONVERSION_DT    
,NCB1.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT                    AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,NCB1.PROCESS_DATE                                  AS PROCESS_DT                    
,COALESCE(NCB1.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)                    AS PRODUCT_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.SALESREP_NUMBER,'=')                 AS SALESREP_NUMBER
,COALESCE(NCB1.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)               AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)           AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)           AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,CASE WHEN NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN -999 
           ELSE 
               CASE   WHEN NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = NCB1.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY   THEN NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
        ELSE 
                          CASE WHEN COALESCE(PART_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') = COALESCE(END_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK')  
						  THEN  NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
           ELSE 
              CASE WHEN   COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
            ELSE          COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)  
                                   END 
       END
           END
   END PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_FINAL
,CASE WHEN NCB1.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG='Y' THEN 'N' 
 ELSE
    (CASE WHEN DD_RMA_FLAG = 'Y' OR DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG = 'Y' OR DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'Y' OR DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG = 'N'  
	       OR DD_OVERLAY_FLAG='Y' OR DD_SALESREP_FLAG ='Y'OR DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG='N'OR DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG='Y' OR DV_NCB_MISC_FLG='Y'           OR DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG='Y' OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' 
		   OR (NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS'AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG ='Y') THEN 'N' 
	  ELSE 
		CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE <> 'WW Distribution' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END 
	END)
 END                                                AS CORP_BOOKINGS_FLG
,NCB1.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT                      AS DV_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT       
,NCB1.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT                  AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_USD_AMT      
,NCB1.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT                      AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT      
,NCB1.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY                           AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY           
,NCB1.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                            AS DD_NCB_SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_LINT    
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG,'=')       AS INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,'=')     AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG,'=')              AS REVENUE_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.SS_CODE,'=')                         AS DD_NCB_SS_CD
,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,'=')            AS CANCELLED_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG,'=')          AS ACQUISITION_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG,'=')           AS IC_REVENUE_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,'=')              AS CHARGES_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,'=')                 AS MISC_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_RMA_FLAG,'=')                     AS RMA_FLAG
,NCB1.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE                   AS DD_NCB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
,NCB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                           AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,'=')  AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,'=')  AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG
,NCB1.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE                     AS DD_NCB_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
,NCB1.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT                 AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,'N'                                                AS DD_OVERLAY_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG,'=')              AS SERVICE_FLAG
,NCB1.EDW_CREATE_DTM                                AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,NCB1.EDW_CREATE_USER                               AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,NCB1.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                                AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,NCB1.EDW_UPDATE_USER                               AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,NCB1.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                             AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,NCB1.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT                   AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NCB1.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                       AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NCB1.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                                AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,NCB1.BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD                       AS BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD
,COALESCE(NCB1.POB_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')               AS POB_TYPE_CD
,COALESCE(NCB1.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,'N')              AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,NCB1.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                   AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,NCB1.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY                AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,NCB1.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE                            AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE                   AS L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
,NCB1.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY                         AS DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
,NCB1.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY                             AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY
,NCB1.END_CUST_PARTY_KEY                            AS END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB1.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB1.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB1.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 FROM
 (
	SELECT
	NCB.SLS_CRDT_ASSIGNMNT_APPLIED_KEY            AS SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
	CAST(FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS DATE)    AS START_TV_DT,
    CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_TV_DT,
	NCB.SALES_ORDER_KEY                           AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
	NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                      AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT               AS FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
	FMNI.PROCESS_DATE                             AS PROCESS_DATE,
	SOL.DD_NCB_PRODUCT_KEY                        AS PRODUCT_KEY,
	NCB.SALES_REP_NUM                             AS SALESREP_NUMBER,
	NCB.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY                 AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	NCB.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                      AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	NCB.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                      AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
	NCB.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY              AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	CASE WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL 
     THEN -999
             WHEN BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL
          THEN COALESCE(SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY ,-999)
             WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY =BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
          THEN BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
               WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY  <> BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
          THEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
        ELSE  -999
    END         PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS,
	
	CASE WHEN PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS =-999 AND NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
    THEN COALESCE(SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)  
    ELSE PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS END AS PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999) DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY,
	CAST(
	SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT *CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
	)                                             AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
	CAST(SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT * CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
												AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,
	CAST(SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT * CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
	)                                             AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT,
	CAST(SOL.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY*CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
												AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY,
	CASE WHEN NP1.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='Amortized One Time' THEN CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) 
	ELSE CAST(CASE WHEN NCB.trx_ss_cd='AR' THEN
					CASE WHEN SOL1.BILLING_MODEL='Monthly Billing' THEN 1
						WHEN SOL1.BILLING_MODEL='Annual Billing'  THEN 12
						WHEN SOL1.BILLING_MODEL='Quarterly Billing'  THEN 3
						WHEN COALESCE(SOL1.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') IN ('Prepaid Term','UNKNOWN')THEN 
						CASE WHEN NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT in(-999,0) 
						OR  NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT NOV RELEASE */
						then 1 ELSE NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END
					END
				WHEN NCB.trx_ss_cd='MANUAL' THEN 1 
			ELSE
					CASE WHEN NCB.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT=0 THEN 
						CASE WHEN NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT in(-999,0)
                            OR  NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT NOV RELEASE */
						then 1 ELSE NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END     
					ELSE 
					CASE WHEN NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT' THEN 1 ELSE/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT NOV RELEASE */
					NCB.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT  
					END END
			END AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
			
	END  *
	CASE WHEN NCB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE') THEN
			CAST(CAST( CAST( ((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE 
			* NCB.ORDER_QUANTITY * (NCB.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT/(CASE WHEN NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 
			OR  NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT NOV RELEASE */
			THEN 1 
				ELSE COALESCE(NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)))/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
				COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
	ELSE
		CAST(CAST( CAST( ((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE * NCB.ORDER_QUANTITY 
		* (NCB.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT/(CASE WHEN NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 
		OR  NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF BSFT NOV RELEASE */
		THEN 1 ELSE 
			COALESCE(NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)))/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
			COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
	END                                         AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,											   								   
	NCB.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD                      AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
	NCB.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                        AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ,
	'N'                                           AS DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG,
	'N'                                           AS DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
	NCB.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG                  AS DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG, 
	'N'                                           AS DD_RMA_FLAG,
	'OPL'                                         AS SS_CODE,
	NCB.DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG                      AS DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,
	'N'                                           AS DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG,
	 CASE WHEN NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG= 'I' THEN 'N'
          WHEN NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END                        
												  AS DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
	SOL.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG                        AS DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,
	SOL.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG                           AS DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,
	SOL.DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG                        AS DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG ,
	SOL.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG            AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
	NCB.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT                      AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE ,
	NCB.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                       AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
	SOL.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG            AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,
	USER                                          AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                          AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER                                          AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                          AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),
	CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))                   AS CONVERSION_RT,
	NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE                      AS CONVERSION_DT  ,               
	NCB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD						  AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	NCB.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT               AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	NCB.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                   AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	NCB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                            AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
	NCB.BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD                   AS BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD ,
    NCB.POB_TYPE_CD                               AS POB_TYPE_CD ,
	NCB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                        AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG ,
	NCB.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY               AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ,
	NCB.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY            AS PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,
	NCB.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG                     AS BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG,
    (CASE WHEN NCB.SALES_REP_NUM IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) 
										          AS DD_SALESREP_FLAG,
	NCB.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE                        AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
	NEP.PARTY_KEY                                 AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
  FROM 
  (
  SELECT
		NSCAT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY               AS SLS_CRDT_ASSIGNMNT_APPLIED_KEY ,
		NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                              AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
		NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                        AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, 
		NSOA.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                               AS PRODUCT_KEY,
		NSOA.SKU_QTY                                      AS ORDER_QUANTITY,      
		NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_UNIT_LIST_PRICE                   AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
		NSCAT.BK_SALES_REP_NUM                            AS SALES_REP_NUM,
        NXSO.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY                AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
        NXSO.BILL_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY                AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
        NXSO.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY                        AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
        NSCAT.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT                            AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ,
        NSCAT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE                   AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
        NSCAT.SPLIT_PCT                                   AS SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
        NSCAT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                         AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
        'OPL'                                             AS BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD,
        NXSO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD                          AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
        NXSO.ORDER_CREATED_DT                             AS ORDER_DATETIME,
        NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                       AS SO_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM,
        NSOT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE                         AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
        CASE WHEN NXSO.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG='Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END 
		                                                  AS SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,
		NSOA.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                            AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD, 
		NSOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT                  AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,     
		NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                        AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      ,     
		COALESCE(NXSO.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)      AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY ,
	    NSOA.POB_TYPE_CD                                  AS POB_TYPE_CD,  
	    NSOA.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                           AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG, 
	    NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                  AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
		NSOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY               AS PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,
		NXSO.TRX_SS_CD                                    AS TRX_SS_CD,
		NXSO.BOOKING_VERSION_INT                          AS BOOKING_VERSION_INT,
		NXSO.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT                      AS BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
		NXSO.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT                    AS INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
		NSOA.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT                        AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
		NXSO.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG                        AS BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG,
		NXSO.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY                    AS END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
		NXSO.SALES_CHANNEL_CD                             AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
		NXSO.SK_TRX_ID_INT                                AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
	    CASE WHEN NXSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END                         
			                                              AS DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,
		CASE

,NCB1.CONVERSION_DT                                 AS CONVERSION_DT    
,NCB1.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT                    AS FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
,NCB1.PROCESS_DATE                                  AS PROCESS_DT                    
,COALESCE(NCB1.PRODUCT_KEY,-999)                    AS PRODUCT_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.SALESREP_NUMBER,'=')                 AS SALESREP_NUMBER
,COALESCE(NCB1.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)               AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)           AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)           AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,-999)           AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
,CASE WHEN NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = -999 THEN -999 
           ELSE 
               CASE   WHEN NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = NCB1.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY   THEN NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
        ELSE 
                          CASE WHEN COALESCE(PART_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') = COALESCE(END_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK')  
						  THEN  NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
           ELSE 
              CASE WHEN   COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999) = -999 THEN NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
            ELSE          COALESCE(DSHIP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)  
                                   END 
       END
           END
   END PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_FINAL
,CASE WHEN NCB1.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG='Y' THEN 'N' 
 ELSE
    (CASE WHEN DD_RMA_FLAG = 'Y' OR DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG = 'Y' OR DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG = 'Y' OR DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG = 'N'  
	       OR DD_OVERLAY_FLAG='Y' OR DD_SALESREP_FLAG ='Y'OR DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG='N'OR DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG='Y' OR DV_NCB_MISC_FLG='Y'           OR DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG='Y' OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN' 
		   OR (NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS'AND NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID ='CDBU' AND ELC.ENABLE_FLAG ='Y') THEN 'N' 
	  ELSE 
		CASE WHEN RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE <> 'WW Distribution' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END 
	END)
 END                                                AS CORP_BOOKINGS_FLG
,NCB1.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT                      AS DV_NCB_COMP_NET_USD_AMT       
,NCB1.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT                  AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_USD_AMT      
,NCB1.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT                      AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT      
,NCB1.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY                           AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY           
,NCB1.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                            AS DD_NCB_SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_LINT    
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG,'=')       AS INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,'=')     AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG,'=')              AS REVENUE_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.SS_CODE,'=')                         AS DD_NCB_SS_CD
,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,'=')            AS CANCELLED_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG,'=')          AS ACQUISITION_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG,'=')           AS IC_REVENUE_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,'=')              AS CHARGES_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,'=')                 AS MISC_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DD_RMA_FLAG,'=')                     AS RMA_FLAG
,NCB1.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE                   AS DD_NCB_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT
,NCB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                           AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,'=')  AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,'=')  AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG
,NCB1.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE                     AS DD_NCB_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
,NCB1.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT                 AS DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,'N'                                                AS DD_OVERLAY_FLAG
,COALESCE(NCB1.DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG,'=')              AS SERVICE_FLAG
,NCB1.EDW_CREATE_DTM                                AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
,NCB1.EDW_CREATE_USER                               AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,NCB1.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                                AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,NCB1.EDW_UPDATE_USER                               AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
,NCB1.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD                             AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,NCB1.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT                   AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,NCB1.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                       AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,NCB1.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                                AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,NCB1.BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD                       AS BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD
,COALESCE(NCB1.POB_TYPE_CD,'UNKNOWN')               AS POB_TYPE_CD
,COALESCE(NCB1.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,'N')              AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,NCB1.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                   AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,NCB1.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY                AS DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,NCB1.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE                            AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE                   AS L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
,NCB1.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY                         AS DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
,NCB1.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY                             AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY
,NCB1.END_CUST_PARTY_KEY                            AS END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB1.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB1.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB1.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 FROM
 (
	SELECT
	NCB.SLS_CRDT_ASSIGNMNT_APPLIED_KEY            AS SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
	CAST(FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS DATE)    AS START_TV_DT,
    CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_TV_DT,
	NCB.SALES_ORDER_KEY                           AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
	NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                      AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT               AS FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
	FMNI.PROCESS_DATE                             AS PROCESS_DATE,
	SOL.DD_NCB_PRODUCT_KEY                        AS PRODUCT_KEY,
	NCB.SALES_REP_NUM                             AS SALESREP_NUMBER,
	NCB.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY                 AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	NCB.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                      AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	NCB.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                      AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
	NCB.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY              AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	CASE WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL 
     THEN -999
             WHEN BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL
          THEN COALESCE(SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY ,-999)
             WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY =BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
          THEN BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
               WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY  <> BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
          THEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
        ELSE  -999
    END         PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS,
	
	CASE WHEN PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS =-999 AND NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
    THEN COALESCE(SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)  
    ELSE PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS END AS PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999) DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY,
	CAST(
	SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT *CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
	)                                             AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
	CAST(SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT * CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
												AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,
	CAST(SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT * CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
	)                                             AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT,
	CAST(SOL.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY*CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
												AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY,
	CASE WHEN NP1.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='Amortized One Time' THEN CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) 
	ELSE CAST(CASE WHEN NCB.trx_ss_cd='AR' THEN
					CASE WHEN SOL1.BILLING_MODEL='Monthly Billing' THEN 1
						WHEN SOL1.BILLING_MODEL='Annual Billing'  THEN 12
						WHEN SOL1.BILLING_MODEL='Quarterly Billing'  THEN 3
						WHEN COALESCE(SOL1.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') IN ('Prepaid Term','UNKNOWN')THEN 
						CASE WHEN NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT in(-999,0) 
						OR NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
						then 1 ELSE NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END
					END
				WHEN NCB.trx_ss_cd='MANUAL' THEN 1 
			ELSE
					CASE WHEN NCB.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT=0 THEN 
						CASE WHEN NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT in(-999,0) 
						OR NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
						then 1 ELSE NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END     
					ELSE 
					CASE WHEN NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT' THEN 1 ELSE/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
					NCB.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT  END
					END
			END AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
			
	END  *
	CASE WHEN NCB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE') THEN
			CAST(CAST( CAST( ((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE 
			* NCB.ORDER_QUANTITY * (NCB.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT/(CASE WHEN NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 
			OR NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
			THEN 1 
				ELSE COALESCE(NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)))/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
				COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
	ELSE
		CAST(CAST( CAST( ((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE * NCB.ORDER_QUANTITY 
		* (NCB.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT/(CASE WHEN NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 
		OR NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
		THEN 1 ELSE 
			COALESCE(NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)))/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
			COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
	END                                         AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,											   								   
	NCB.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD                      AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
	NCB.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                        AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ,
	'N'                                           AS DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG,
	'N'                                           AS DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
	NCB.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG                  AS DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG, 
	'N'                                           AS DD_RMA_FLAG,
	'OPL'                                         AS SS_CODE,
	NCB.DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG                      AS DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,
	'N'                                           AS DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG,
	 CASE WHEN NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG= 'I' THEN 'N'
          WHEN NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END                        
												  AS DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
	SOL.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG                        AS DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,
	SOL.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG                           AS DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,
	SOL.DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG                        AS DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG ,
	SOL.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG            AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
	NCB.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT                      AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE ,
	NCB.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                       AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
	SOL.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG            AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,
	USER                                          AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                          AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER                                          AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                          AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),
	CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))                   AS CONVERSION_RT,
	NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE                      AS CONVERSION_DT  ,               
	NCB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD						  AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	NCB.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT               AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	NCB.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                   AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	NCB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                            AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
	NCB.BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD                   AS BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD ,
    NCB.POB_TYPE_CD                               AS POB_TYPE_CD ,
	NCB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                        AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG ,
	NCB.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY               AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ,
	NCB.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY            AS PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,
	NCB.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG                     AS BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG,
    (CASE WHEN NCB.SALES_REP_NUM IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) 
										          AS DD_SALESREP_FLAG,
	NCB.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE                        AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
	NEP.PARTY_KEY                                 AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
					    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
  FROM 
  (
  SELECT
		NSCAT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY             AS SLS_CRDT_ASSIGNMNT_APPLIED_KEY ,
		NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                            AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
		NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                      AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
		NXSO.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY                   AS PRODUCT_KEY,
		NXSO.TRANSACTION_QTY                            AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
		NXSO.LIST_PRICE                                 AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
        NSCAT.BK_SALES_REP_NUM                          AS SALES_REP_NUM,
        NXSO.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY              AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
        NXSO.BILL_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY              AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
        NXSO.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY                      AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
        NSCAT.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT                          AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ,
        NSCAT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE                 AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
        NSCAT.SPLIT_PCT                                 AS SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
        NSCAT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                       AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
        'OPL'                                           AS BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD,
        NXSO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD                        AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
        NXSO.ORDER_CREATED_DT                           AS ORDER_DATETIME,
        NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                     AS SO_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM,
        NSOT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE                       AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
        CASE WHEN NXSO.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG='Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END 
		                                                AS SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,
        CASE WHEN (NSOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY IS NOT NULL OR NSOA_MPOB.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY IS NOT NULL)  THEN 'BUNDLE' ELSE  'STANDALONE' END AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,  
        CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT)                           AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,     
        NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                      AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      ,     
        COALESCE(NXSO.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)    AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
        NSOA_MPOB.POB_TYPE_CD                           AS POB_TYPE_CD,
        NSOA_MPOB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                    AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
        NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
		NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                AS PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,
		NXSO.TRX_SS_CD                                  AS TRX_SS_CD,
		NXSO.BOOKING_VERSION_INT                        AS BOOKING_VERSION_INT,
		NXSO.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT                    AS BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
		NXSO.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT                  AS INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
		NXSO.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT                      AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
		NXSO.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG                      AS BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG,
		NXSO.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY                  AS END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
	    NXSO.SALES_CHANNEL_CD                           AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
		NXSO.SK_TRX_ID_INT                              AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
		CASE WHEN NXSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END                         
			                                            AS DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,
		CASE 
             WHEN NXSO.SALES_CHANNEL_CD  IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
             THEN CAST(-777 AS Integer) 
             ELSE COALESCE(NXSO.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) 
            END                                         AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
		NXSO.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
					    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NXSO.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NXSO.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NXSO.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
        FROM
		   (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV 
		   WHERE END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <>'CLOUD-CBM') NXSO
		   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLT
		   ON  NXSO.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
		   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
		   ON NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
		   AND NSOT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'  
		   AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00' 
               
           INNER JOIN (
		     SELECT SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY,BK_SALES_REP_NUM,SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, 
			 NSCAT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SPLIT_PCT                                                         
			 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX NSCAT
			 INNER JOIN 
			 (SELECT DISTINCT SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV
             WHERE END_TV_DTM=Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD <>'CLOUD-CBM') NXSO
			 ON NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NSCAT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
		     WHERE NSCAT.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
             AND   NSCAT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'
			 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
			         ) NSCAT
		   ON NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NSCAT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY      
		   LEFT JOIN (SELECT PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM)SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM 
           FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_TV  
           WHERE END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' AND POB_TYPE_CD='UNKNOWN' AND PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY>0
		   AND TSL_TRX_TYPE_CD='ORDER'
           GROUP BY 1) NSOA
           ON NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY =NSOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY

       INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR NLOC
