,NCB1.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE                            AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
,RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE                   AS L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE
,NCB1.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY                         AS DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
,NCB1.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY                             AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY
,NCB1.END_CUST_PARTY_KEY                            AS END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
				    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB1.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB1.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB1.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
 FROM
 (
	SELECT
	NCB.SLS_CRDT_ASSIGNMNT_APPLIED_KEY            AS SALES_CREDIT_ASGN_KEY,
	CAST(FMNI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS DATE)    AS START_TV_DT,
    CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_TV_DT,
	NCB.SALES_ORDER_KEY                           AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
	NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                      AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	FMNI.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT               AS FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
	FMNI.PROCESS_DATE                             AS PROCESS_DATE,
	SOL.DD_NCB_PRODUCT_KEY                        AS PRODUCT_KEY,
	NCB.SALES_REP_NUM                             AS SALESREP_NUMBER,
	NCB.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY                 AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	NCB.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                      AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	NCB.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY                      AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
	NCB.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY              AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
	CASE WHEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL 
     THEN -999
             WHEN BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY IS NULL
          THEN COALESCE(SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY ,-999)
             WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY =BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
          THEN BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
               WHEN  SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY  <> BILL_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY 
          THEN SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
        ELSE  -999
    END         PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS,
	
	CASE WHEN PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS =-999 AND NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME LIKE ANY  ('%CS CAPITAL%','%CISCO SYSTEMS CAPITAL%', 'CISCO SYSTEMS FINANCE %','EXPEDIA INC')
    THEN COALESCE(SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)  
    ELSE PARTNER_PARTY_KEY_AS_IS END AS PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999) DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(SOLD_TO_PARENT.DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY,
	CAST(
	SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_NET_PRC_USD_AMT *CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
	)                                             AS DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
	CAST(SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT * CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6))
												AS DV_NCB_COMP_LIST_PRC_USD_AMT,
	CAST(SOL.DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT * CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)
	)                                             AS DV_NCB_COMP_COST_USD_AMT,
	CAST(SOL.DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY*CAST((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
												AS DV_NCB_EXTENDED_QTY,
	CASE WHEN NP1.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD='Amortized One Time' THEN CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)) 
	ELSE CAST(CASE WHEN NCB.trx_ss_cd='AR' THEN
					CASE WHEN SOL1.BILLING_MODEL='Monthly Billing' THEN 1
						WHEN SOL1.BILLING_MODEL='Annual Billing'  THEN 12
						WHEN SOL1.BILLING_MODEL='Quarterly Billing'  THEN 3
						WHEN COALESCE(SOL1.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') IN ('Prepaid Term','UNKNOWN')THEN 
						CASE WHEN NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT in(-999,0) 
						OR NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
						then 1 ELSE NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END
					END
				WHEN NCB.trx_ss_cd='MANUAL' THEN 1 
			ELSE
					CASE WHEN NCB.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT=0 THEN 
						CASE WHEN NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT in(-999,0) 
						OR NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
						then 1 ELSE NCB.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT END     
					ELSE 
					CASE WHEN NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT' THEN 1 ELSE/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
					NCB.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT  END
					END
			END AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
			
	END  *
	CASE WHEN NCB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE') THEN
			CAST(CAST( CAST( ((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE 
			* NCB.ORDER_QUANTITY * (NCB.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT/(CASE WHEN NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 
			OR NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
			THEN 1 
				ELSE COALESCE(NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)))/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
				COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))  AS DECIMAL(18,6) )  
	ELSE
		CAST(CAST( CAST( ((SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE * NCB.ORDER_QUANTITY 
		* (NCB.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT/(CASE WHEN NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT=0 
		OR NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
		THEN 1 ELSE 
			COALESCE(NCB.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,1) END)))/100.000000) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) AS DECIMAL(18,6) ) * 
			COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11))) AS DECIMAL(18,6) )   
	END                                         AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,											   								   
	NCB.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD                      AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
	NCB.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT                        AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ,
	'N'                                           AS DV_NCB_INTERNTNL_DEMO_FLG,
	'N'                                           AS DV_NCB_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
	NCB.SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG                  AS DV_NCB_REVENUE_FLG, 
	--'N'                                           AS DD_RMA_FLAG,
	CASE WHEN NCB.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE = 'RETURN' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DD_RMA_FLAG,
	'OPL'                                         AS SS_CODE,
	NCB.DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG                      AS DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,
	'N'                                           AS DV_NCB_ACQUISITION_FLG,
	 CASE WHEN NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG= 'I' THEN 'N'
          WHEN NCAT_IC.INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END                        
												  AS DV_NCB_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
	SOL.DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG                        AS DV_NCB_CHARGES_FLG,
	SOL.DV_NCB_MISC_FLG                           AS DV_NCB_MISC_FLG,
	SOL.DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG                        AS DV_NCB_SERVICE_FLG ,
	SOL.DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG            AS DV_NCB_IC_SPECIAL_DISCOUNT_FLG,
	NCB.SALES_COMMISSION_PCT                      AS SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE ,
	NCB.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                       AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
	SOL.DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG            AS DV_NCB_CFS_CREDIT_CHK_PEND_FLG,
	USER                                          AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                          AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER                                          AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                          AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(18,11)),
	CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(18,11)))                   AS CONVERSION_RT,
	NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE                      AS CONVERSION_DT  ,               
	NCB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD						  AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	NCB.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT               AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	NCB.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                   AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	NCB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY                            AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
	NCB.BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD                   AS BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD ,
    NCB.POB_TYPE_CD                               AS POB_TYPE_CD ,
	NCB.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG                        AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG ,
	NCB.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY               AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ,
	NCB.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY            AS PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,
	NCB.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG                     AS BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG,
    (CASE WHEN NCB.SALES_REP_NUM IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) 
										          AS DD_SALESREP_FLAG,
	NCB.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE                        AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
	NEP.PARTY_KEY                                 AS SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY,
	COALESCE(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
	NCB.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME , NCB.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE
					    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NCB.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NCB.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NCB.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
  FROM 
  (
  SELECT
		NSCAT.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY             AS SLS_CRDT_ASSIGNMNT_APPLIED_KEY ,
		NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY                            AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
		NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                      AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
		NXSO.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY                   AS PRODUCT_KEY,
		NXSO.TRANSACTION_QTY                            AS ORDER_QUANTITY,
		NXSO.LIST_PRICE                                 AS UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
        NSCAT.BK_SALES_REP_NUM                          AS SALES_REP_NUM,
        NXSO.SHIP_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY              AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
        NXSO.BILL_TO_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY              AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY ,
        NXSO.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY                      AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
        NSCAT.SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT                          AS SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT ,
        NSCAT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE                 AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
        NSCAT.SPLIT_PCT                                 AS SALES_COMMISSION_PCT ,
        NSCAT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY                       AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
        'OPL'                                           AS BK_ATRBTN_SOURCE_SYS_CD,
        NXSO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD                        AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
        NXSO.ORDER_CREATED_DT                           AS ORDER_DATETIME,
        NSOT.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME                     AS SO_SOURCE_CREATE_DTM,
        NSOT.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE                       AS CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
        /*CASE WHEN NXSO.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG='Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END 
		                                                AS SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,*/
		CASE
		WHEN NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE ='RETURN' THEN 'N'
		WHEN NSOT.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME LIKE '%CBM RMA with credit%' THEN 'N'
		WHEN NSOT.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME = 'CBM Component Sales' THEN 'N'
		ELSE 'Y'
		END AS SO_TYPE_REVENUE_GEN_FLAG,		
        'STANDALONE'  AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,  
        CAST(-9999 AS BIGINT)                           AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,     
        NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY                      AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY      ,     
        COALESCE(NXSO.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY,-999)    AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY , 
        'UNKNOWN'                           AS POB_TYPE_CD,
        'N'                    AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
        NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
		NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY                AS PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY,
		NXSO.TRX_SS_CD                                  AS TRX_SS_CD,
		NXSO.BOOKING_VERSION_INT                        AS BOOKING_VERSION_INT,
		NXSO.BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT                    AS BOOKING_TERM_MONTHS_CNT,
		NXSO.INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT                  AS INITIAL_TERM_DUR_MTHS_CNT,
		NXSO.PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT                      AS PRICING_TERM_MTHS_CNT,
		NXSO.BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG                      AS BOOKING_EXCLUSION_FLG,
		NXSO.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY                  AS END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,
	    NXSO.SALES_CHANNEL_CD                           AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
		NXSO.SK_TRX_ID_INT                              AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
		CASE WHEN NXSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_TYPE_CD = 'CANCEL' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END                         
			                                            AS DD_NCB_CANCELLED_FLG,
		CASE 
             WHEN NXSO.SALES_CHANNEL_CD  IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
             THEN CAST(-777 AS Integer) 
             ELSE COALESCE(NXSO.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) 
            END                                         AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
		NXSO.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD AS ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD/*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
		,NSOT.SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME , NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE
					    /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
 ,NXSO.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NXSO.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NXSO.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
        FROM
		   (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV 
		   WHERE END_TV_DTM=CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='CLOUD-CBM') NXSO
		   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  NSOLT
		   ON  NXSO.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
		   INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
		   ON NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
		   AND NSOT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00'  
		   AND NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME='3500-01-01 00.00.00' 
               
           INNER JOIN (
		     SELECT SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY,BK_SALES_REP_NUM,SK_TRX_SC_ID_INT,BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, 
			 NSCAT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,SPLIT_PCT                                                         
			 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX NSCAT
			 INNER JOIN 
			 (SELECT DISTINCT SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX_TV
             WHERE END_TV_DTM=Cast('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AND XAAS_TRX_METRIC_TYPE_NAME='ENB' AND ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='CLOUD-CBM') NXSO
			 ON NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NSCAT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
		     WHERE NSCAT.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
             AND   NSCAT.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'
			 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
			         ) NSCAT
		   ON NXSO.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NSCAT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY      
		   WHERE NSOLT.SS_CODE IN ('OPL')
) NCB
 
    CROSS JOIN
    (
     SELECT 
     NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,
     NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,
     BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
     BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
     FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM, 
     $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
     WHERE NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
     AND NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
    ) FMNI
	
	INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_NCB_TV SOL  
    ON (SOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NCB.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY
    AND SOL.END_TV_DT='3500-01-01')

	
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE SITE_USE          
    ON SITE_USE.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NCB.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY 
    
	LEFT OUTER JOIN ($$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCAT_IC) 
    ON SITE_USE.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY=NCAT_IC.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  

	
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
	ON (NCB.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE=NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
	AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD'
	AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=NCB.ORDER_DATETIME
	AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE='CORPORATE')
    /*ADDED AS PART OF NOV BSFT RELEASE*/
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_PRICE_TV NPPTB ON (NPPTB.ITEM_KEY = NCB.PRODUCT_KEY) AND NPPTB.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME = 'Base Price List' AND NCB.ORDER_DATETIME BETWEEN NPPTB.START_TV_DATE AND NPPTB. END_TV_DATE AND 
    NCB.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'

	 
	  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_END_CUST_LOC
                 ON(NECAL_END_CUST_LOC.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NCB.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY )
	 
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
                                 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY NEP
                                 ON(NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER) 
                                                                 )
                 ON (NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY= NCB.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY )
				 
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL
                 ON(NECAL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NCB.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY )
				 
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE  SOLD_TO_PARENT
                 ON(NEP.PARTY_KEY=SOLD_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY)
                 AND SOLD_TO_PARENT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
				 
     LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE  BILL_TO_PARENT
                 ON(NECAL.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=BILL_TO_PARENT.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY)	
     
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE STP
                 ON STP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY = NCB.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
	 
	 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE SHIPS
                 ON STP.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=SHIPS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
                 AND SHIPS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'				 

	LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT COALESCE(SOL.BILLING_MODEL,'UNKNOWN') BILLING_MODEL,TRX_ID,TRX_VERSION  FROM 
    $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_BOOKING_TRANSACTIONS XBT
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXOPL_ORDER_LINES_ALL SOL ON SOL.LINE_ID=CAST(XBT.LINE_ID AS BIGINT)) SOL1
    ON (SOL1.TRX_ID=NCB.SK_TRX_ID_INT AND SOL1.TRX_VERSION=NCB.BOOKING_VERSION_INT)
	
	LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP1
    ON NP1.ITEM_KEY = NCB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
  
) NCB1


LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NCB1.PRODUCT_KEY
 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF      
ON NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
 
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDBU ELC      
ON NPF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID = ELC.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
AND NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = ELC.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE

LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH
ON RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = NCB1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT  
          NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,NPLA.PARTY_KEY
      FROM       $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR NLOC
      ON       NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY=NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY
      AND       NLOC.SS_CODE='CR'
      AND       NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE='POSTAL ADDRESS'
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
      ON       NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY=NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY 
     ) PART_CTRY
ON       NCB1.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY = PART_CTRY.PARTY_KEY 

LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT     NPAL.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, NPLA.PARTY_KEY
       FROM       $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_LOCATOR_ASGN NPLA
       INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LOCATOR NLOC
      ON       NPLA.LOCATOR_KEY=NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY
      AND       NLOC.SS_CODE='CR'
      AND       NPLA.LOCATION_TYPE_CODE='POSTAL ADDRESS'
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_POSTAL_ADDRESS_LOCATOR NPAL
      ON       NLOC.LOCATOR_KEY=NPAL.LOCATOR_KEY 
    ) END_CTRY
ON       NCB1.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = END_CTRY.PARTY_KEY       

LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT PS.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY, 
     COALESCE(PS.BK_PARTY_ID_INT,-999) PARTY_ID,
     COALESCE(DD_GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,
     COALESCE (BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  ISO_COUNTRY_CODE
      FROM 
     $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE PS,
     $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY PC
      WHERE 1=1
      AND   PS.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY = PC.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY
        AND   PS.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
      AND   PC.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
      QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE 
         ORDER BY PARTY_ID ASC) =1)  DSHIP
   /*ON WCMC.BILL_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY = DSHIP.GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY*/
ON  NCB1.SOLD_TO_GRAND_PRNT_PTY_KEY = DSHIP.GRNDPARNT_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY /* SOT XAAS AUG-10 CDR */
AND COALESCE(END_CTRY.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE, 'UNK') = DSHIP.ISO_COUNTRY_CODE         
)NCB2   
LEFT OUTER JOIN  ($$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER_SITE NCPST 
      INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHNL_PTNR_COUNTRY NCPCT
     ON   (NCPCT.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY= NCPST.PARTNER_COUNTRY_PARTY_KEY
     AND     NCPST.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N'
     AND     NCPCT.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG='N')) 
ON (NCPST.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY=NCB2.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY_FINAL)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CHN_SP_NODES  ECSN
ON ( NCB2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY =ECSN.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY)
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_PARTY RCPH_SOLD_TO
ON (RCPH_SOLD_TO.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=NCB2.SOLD_TO_PARTY_KEY)
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_PARTY RCPH_END_CUST
ON (RCPH_END_CUST.CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY=NCB2.END_CUST_PARTY_KEY)

 NCB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
